data.content: Added retry with exponential backoff (1s, 2s, 4s) to nextKnot() in knots.ts. Uses classifyErrorMessage + isRetryableByDefault from backend-errors.ts to only retry transient errors (LOCKED, TIMEOUT, UNAVAILABLE, RATE_LIMITED). Non-transient errors fail immediately. Added execWriteWithRetry wrapper and sleep helper. 6 tests in knots-retry.test.ts cover: success on first try, retry-then-succeed, no retry on non-transient, exhaust all retries, succeed on final retry, stop retrying on non-transient mid-retry. All 1678 tests pass, 0 lint errors, clean typecheck. Commit 0b5af29.
